programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh Rowland, Rick Yemm and Alex Debogorski embark on an epic race over one of the longest and most treacherous roads in Canada.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Dolph Lundgren, 1985. Rocky Balboa vows to get revenge when a Soviet boxer kills his friend Apollo Creed in the ring.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Dolph Lundgren, 1985. Rocky Balboa vows to get revenge when a Soviet boxer kills his friend Apollo Creed in the ring.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the top flight of French football, including Marseille v Metz, Rennes v Angers, Nice v Le Havre, Toulouse v Lille and Lyon v Lorient.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: US cooking competition. An intense BBQ challenge is judged by pitmaster Aaron Franklin, but it is Gordon who decides which chef is not so 'grill-iant'.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur Is Dead, Long Live Arthur: Comedy-drama series. Arthur considers taking his own life when faced with a massive tax demand.

programme.title: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Thrilling spy drama. A paranoid Weir alienates Ben as he connects the dots between Senator Evers and Crowley while his team make a plan to finally reach Crowley.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: British Touring Car Crashes and Smashes
programme.desc: A short sports film depicting extraordinary British Touring Car crashes and smashes.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is badly wounded and loses his memory while helping a murder witness escape from assassins who are determined to silence her.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A gypsy tries to thwart Theo's pursuit of a serial killer who murdered several members of her clan as she intends her own vengeance.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. A conman and his girlfriend trick a prominent scientist with a tale about hidden treasure.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Protecting a woman from her nuisance husband appears to be a straightforward assignment until strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and Carter are photographed while being confronted by a newsman with information on an unsolved robbery.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Two of the most aggressive drivers duke it out in a clash between Skorpios and Yeti in a tactically tantalising Main Event.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: TC learns that his daughter Melody has been abducted and decides that he has no choice but to sell his business to pay for her return.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The Queen of Hearts is Wild: Classic US detective drama. A woman is the only witness to the murder of a police officer, but her gangster boyfriend is an old enemy of Theo.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint investigates allegations that the Loch Ness Monster is killing people.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken is on the brink of quitting the security business after dealing with a messy adultery case so Harry sends him to a rural retreat.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Haskins is framed for corruption while Regan and Carter investigate a spate of break-ins. Is there a connection.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur attempts to do a deal with Tony Benson and his new nightclub, and Terry helps Dave by looking after the Winchester Club.

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
programme.desc: Action film starring Sean Connery and Kim Basinger, 1983. James Bond is summoned when the villainous SPECTRE organisation steals two nuclear bombs and threatens to detonate them.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
programme.desc: Action film starring Sean Connery and Kim Basinger, 1983. James Bond is summoned when the villainous SPECTRE organisation steals two nuclear bombs and threatens to detonate them.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: In the Shadow of Grizzly Smith: Wrestling documentary series. Jake 'The Snake' Roberts and his siblings struggle to reconcile with their past after surviving familial abuse and more.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur extends the grasping hand of free enterprise across the Iron Curtain when a Russian ship arrives in port.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor. Judith's sister makes a move on Alan at a birthday party for Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark: American sitcom. Judith and Alan decide to send Jake to a therapist after realising that he might be having a hard time handling their divorce.

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Nijinsky's Triple Crown
programme.desc: A short sports film about the legendary racehorse.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Europe-based adventure series. The wife of a president hires the Protectors to guard her critically-ill husband when she fears he may be kidnapped.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including FA Cup highlights of Hereford United vs Arsenal, Fulham vs Sheffield Wednesday, and Liverpool vs Aston Villa.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season that includes highlights of Everton vs Newcastle United and Huddersfield Town against Manchester City.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An informant of Regan's tells him about a hijack involving a lorryload of cigarettes where he will be the look-out man. But can Regan trust his snout.

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell and the team are at Ayr ahead of today's racing which includes the Scottish Grand National.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore introduces football highlights from December 1971 as Arsenal entertain Coventry City and Liverpool and Derby County play out a five goal thriller.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood takes a look back at the glory days of British wrestling with some classic action from the archives.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Flymo Lawnmowers and Silent Night Mattresses: Learn how the hovercraft inspired one of Britain's best-selling lawnmowers, then how a bedmaker is giving us a good night's sleep.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The first case for Jeremy Brett's Sherlock Holmes. A huge scandal threatens the foreign power of Bohemia as Holmes is outwitted by a bewitching woman.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson unravel the mystery of the 'dancing men' when Hilton Cubitt asks Holmes for help in finding a person sending frightening messages to his wife.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. The Admiralty endorses a daring plan to overthrow the French government.

programme.title: European Qualifier: Ice v Eng
programme.desc: The Lionesses travel to Iceland for the next match in their 2027 World Cup qualifying campaign, from the National Football Stadium in Reykjavik.

programme.title: Copa Del Rey: Atl Mad v Sociedad
programme.desc: Coverage of the 124th Copa del Rey Final from Seville, as Atletico Madrid take on Real Sociedad in Spain's showpiece cup final.
